nasb.text: Deacons likewise must be men of dignity, not double-tongued, or addicted to much wine or fond of sordid gain,

esv.text: Deacons likewise must be dignified, not double-tongued,  not addicted to much wine, not greedy for dishonest gain.

cnv.text: 照樣，執事也必須莊重，不一口兩舌，不酗酒，不貪不義之財，

ccb.text: 同样，做执事的也要品行端正，说话诚实，不好酒，不贪财，

csbs.text: 做执事的也一样，必须庄重，不一口两舌，不酗酒，不贪图不正当的利益，
